action_set_definitions.name: observe_market
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current market prices and metadata for all available energy commodity tickers, including their classification as spot or futures instruments.

action_set_definitions.name: observe_portfolio
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the agent's portfolio, including liquid cash balance and the quantities of all assets held.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_trade
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a buy or sell order for a specific ticker symbol. The transaction is subject to the current market fee rate.

ticker.description: The ticker symbol of the commodity/instrument to trade.

quantity.description: The amount to trade. Use positive values for buying (long) and negative values for selling (short/liquidating).

state_description.cash_balance: The amount of liquid currency available for purchasing assets.
state_description.portfolio_holdings: A mapping of asset tickers to the quantity currently held in the portfolio.
state_description.market_prices: The current market price for each trackable ticker symbol.
state_description.transaction_fee_rate: The percentage cost applied to the total value of each trade (e.g., 0.001 for 0.1%).
state_description.current_step: The current discrete time step in the simulation.
